titles.en: Chapter on Ensuring the Absence of Pregnancy in Bondwomen (istibra)
Chapter on Ensuring the Absence of Pregnancy in Bondwomen (istibra)

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَشْتَرِي اَلْجَارِيَةَ مِنَ اَلرَّجُلِ اَلْمَأْمُونِ فَيُخْبِرُنِي أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَمَسَّهَا مُنْذُ طَمِثَتْ عِنْدَهُ وَ طَهُرَتْ قَالَ "لَيْسَ بِجَائِزٍ أَنْ تَأْتِيَهَا حَتَّى تَسْتَبْرِئَهَا بِحَيْضَةٍ وَ لَكِنْ يَجُوزُ لَكَ مَا دُونَ اَلْفَرْجِ إِنَّ اَلَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ اَلْإِمَاءَ ثُمَّ يَأْتُونَهُنَّ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَبْرِءُوهُنَّ فَأُولَئِكَ اَلزُّنَاةُ بِأَمْوَالِهِمْ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَشْتَرِي اَلْجَارِيَةَ مِنَ اَلرَّجُلِ اَلْمَأْمُونِ فَيُخْبِرُنِي أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَمَسَّهَا مُنْذُ طَمِثَتْ عِنْدَهُ وَ طَهُرَتْ قَالَ "لَيْسَ بِجَائِزٍ أَنْ تَأْتِيَهَا حَتَّى تَسْتَبْرِئَهَا بِحَيْضَةٍ وَ لَكِنْ يَجُوزُ لَكَ مَا دُونَ اَلْفَرْجِ إِنَّ اَلَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ اَلْإِمَاءَ ثُمَّ يَأْتُونَهُنَّ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَبْرِءُوهُنَّ فَأُولَئِكَ اَلزُّنَاةُ بِأَمْوَالِهِمْ".

segments:
Hadith.4545 - Abdullah ibn al-Qasim narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, who said:
I asked Abu Abdillah (as): "I purchase a bondwoman from a trustworthy man who informs me that he has not touched her since she menstruated and then purified herself. Is it permissible for me to have relations with her?"
Imam (as) said: "It is not permissible for you to have relations with her until she undergoes one menstrual cycle (for istibra'). However, you are allowed to engage in activities other than intercourse. Indeed, those who purchase bondwomans and have relations with them before ensuring they are free from pregnancy through istibra', such people are committing adultery with their wealth."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4545 - Abdullah ibn al-Qasim narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, who said:
I asked Abu Abdillah (as): "I purchase a bondwoman from a trustworthy man who informs me that he has not touched her since she menstruated and then purified herself. Is it permissible for me to have relations with her?"
Imam (as) said: "It is not permissible for you to have relations with her until she undergoes one menstrual cycle (for istibra'). However, you are allowed to engage in activities other than intercourse. Indeed, those who purchase bondwomans and have relations with them before ensuring they are free from pregnancy through istibra', such people are committing adultery with their wealth."

narratorChain.raw: 4545 - رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ اَلْقَاسِمِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Ensuring the Absence of Pregnancy in Bondwomen (istibra)

segments: 4546 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا اِشْتَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ جَارِيَةً وَ هِيَ لَمْ تُدْرِكْ أَوْ قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ اَلْحَيْضِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ لاَ يَسْتَبْرِئَهَا".
arabic.text: 4546 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا اِشْتَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ جَارِيَةً وَ هِيَ لَمْ تُدْرِكْ أَوْ قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ اَلْحَيْضِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ لاَ يَسْتَبْرِئَهَا".

segments:
Hadith.4546 - Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"If a man purchases a bondwoman who has not yet reached maturity or has passed the age of menstruation, then there is no harm if he does not observe an istibra' (waiting period) for her."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4546 - Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"If a man purchases a bondwoman who has not yet reached maturity or has passed the age of menstruation, then there is no harm if he does not observe an istibra' (waiting period) for her."

titles.en: Chapter on Ensuring the Absence of Pregnancy in Bondwomen (istibra)

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِشْتَرَى جَارِيَةً وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ صَاحِبُهَا يَطَؤُهَا أَ يَسْتَبْرِئُ رَحِمَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ جَارِيَةٌ لَمْ تَحِضْ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ بِهَا قَالَ "أَمْرُهَا شَدِيدٌ فَإِنْ أَتَاهَا فَلاَ يُنْزِلْ حَتَّى يَسْتَبِينَ لَهُ أَنَّهَا حُبْلَى أَوْ لاَ " قُلْتُ لَهُ فِي كَمْ يَسْتَبِينُ لَهُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ "فِي خَمْسٍ وَ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً".
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِشْتَرَى جَارِيَةً وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ صَاحِبُهَا يَطَؤُهَا أَ يَسْتَبْرِئُ رَحِمَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ جَارِيَةٌ لَمْ تَحِضْ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ بِهَا قَالَ "أَمْرُهَا شَدِيدٌ فَإِنْ أَتَاهَا فَلاَ يُنْزِلْ حَتَّى يَسْتَبِينَ لَهُ أَنَّهَا حُبْلَى أَوْ لاَ " قُلْتُ لَهُ فِي كَمْ يَسْتَبِينُ لَهُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ "فِي خَمْسٍ وَ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً".

segments:
Hadith.4547 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who said: I asked him about a man who purchased a bondwoman and her previous owner had not had relations with her. Should he still observe an istibra' (waiting period) for her womb?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
I asked: "What about a bondwoman who has not yet menstruated? What should he do with her?"
Imam (as) said: "Her matter is more severe. If he has relations with her, he must not ejaculate until it becomes clear whether she is pregnant or not."
I asked: "How long will it take for this to become clear?"
Imam (as) said: "In forty-five nights."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4547 - Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who said: I asked him about a man who purchased a bondwoman and her previous owner had not had relations with her. Should he still observe an istibra' (waiting period) for her womb?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
I asked: "What about a bondwoman who has not yet menstruated? What should he do with her?"
Imam (as) said: "Her matter is more severe. If he has relations with her, he must not ejaculate until it becomes clear whether she is pregnant or not."
I asked: "How long will it take for this to become clear?"
Imam (as) said: "In forty-five nights."

narratorChain.raw: 4547 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ
